Several good, sweet apple tree with heavy fruit on teh north side of the alsea highway by the cemetery, and all along the road west of it. Right off the road, not too hard to reach. Not crabapples, APPLES. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: September-Novemb
Along the banks at Mill Creek Park, and the road to either direction. Loads of good blackberries easy to reach, and on public land. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: July-October.
